description: Registry for Tax Monitor Pro public directory routes and integrations.

routes.name: directory_index
routes.purpose: Return directory listing and featured profiles.

routes.name: directory_profile
routes.purpose: Return profile data for a specific tax professional.

routes.name: directory_review_submit
routes.purpose: Submit a review for a directory profile.

routes.name: cal_pro_oauth_start
routes.purpose: Begin OAuth connection for a tax professional's Cal.com account.

routes.name: cal_pro_oauth_callback
routes.purpose: OAuth callback for tax professional Cal.com connection.
